title: Carpe Diem School staff go under the scissors for Cansa
description: GEORGE NEWS AND GALLERY - There was great...
bodyText: [{"type":"contributor","text":"Michelle Pienaar","contributorName":"Michelle Pienaar","contributorDate":"Friday, 06 February 2026, 09:52"},{"type":"intro_bold","text":"School principal Grobler challenged other schools in George to follow their example and take part in similar initiatives in support of cancer patients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS AND GALLERY - There was great excitement yesterday morning at Carpe Diem School, where principal Elzeth Grobler and six teachers had their hair cut or shaved in support of cancer awareness.","html":"GEORGE NEWS AND GALLERY - There was great excitement yesterday morning at Carpe Diem School, where principal Elzeth Grobler and six teachers had their hair cut or shaved in support of cancer awareness."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The event, which takes place every three to four years, drew enthusiastic support from learners and staff alike.","html":"The event, which takes place every three to four years, drew enthusiastic support from learners and staff alike."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"All ponytails were donated to Cansa to be used in the making of wigs for cancer patients."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grobler and her team shared the special moment with learners in the school hall on World Cancer Day, 4 February.","html":"Grobler and her team shared the special moment with learners in the school hall on World Cancer Day, 4 February."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Adding a personal touch to the occasion, Grobler’s son, hairdresser Ian Grobler, cut his mother’s hair.","html":"Adding a personal touch to the occasion, Grobler’s son, hairdresser Ian Grobler, cut his mother’s hair."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Teacher Karen Fourie shaved her hair with a number one blade, while Zelda Oosthuizen opted for a number six.","html":"Teacher Karen Fourie shaved her hair with a number one blade, while Zelda Oosthuizen opted for a number six."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GALLERY - Carpe Diem se skoolhoof en onderwysers laat waai hul hare vir kanker","html":"GALLERY - Carpe Diem se skoolhoof en onderwysers laat waai hul hare vir kanker"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The other four teachers who had their hair cut were Denise Bezuidenhout, Lize-Mari Carolus, Leana van Rensburg and Elriette Schwim.","html":"The other four teachers who had their hair cut were Denise Bezuidenhout, Lize-Mari Carolus, Leana van Rensburg and Elriette Schwim."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Two hairdressers from Michelangelo Hair Academy, Elsa Steyn and Lara Muller, also participated in the event.","html":"Two hairdressers from Michelangelo Hair Academy, Elsa Steyn and Lara Muller, also participated in the event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Grobler challenged other schools in George to follow their example and take part in similar initiatives in support of cancer patients.","html":"Grobler challenged other schools in George to follow their example and take part in similar initiatives in support of cancer patients."},{"type":"image_with_caption","text":"Karen Fourie is extatic about her new look. It's been the second time since 2020 that she decided to shave her head. Ian Grobler excecutes the task. With her is Zelda Oosthuizen, who shaved her hair with a number 6 blade, and school principal Elzeth Grobler (at the back, left).","imageUrl":"https://cms.groupeditors.com//media/1/1///bf69a8f9-4aa0-4e3b-8815-05b97db478b4.JPG","caption":"Karen Fourie is extatic about her new look. It's been the second time since 2020 that she decided to shave her head. Ian Grobler excecutes the task. With her is Zelda Oosthuizen, who shaved her hair with a number 6 blade, and school principal Elzeth Grobler (at the back, left)."}]

images.alt: Carpe Diem School staff go under the scissors for Cansa
Carpe Diem School staff go under the scissors for Cansa
images.caption: Karen Fourie is extatic about her new look. It's been the second time since 2020 that she decided to shave her head. Ian Grobler excecutes the task. With her is Zelda Oosthuizen, who shaved her hair with a number 6 blade, and school principal Elzeth Grobler (at the back, left).

author: Michelle  Pienaar
teaser: School principal Grobler challenged other schools in George to follow their example and take part in similar initiatives in support of cancer patients.
featuredCaption: Carpe Diem principal Elzeth Grobler and six teachers had their hair cut or shaved in support of cancer awareness. Photos: Michelle Pienaar
